'''hamata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huabiao|huabiao]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huabiao|huabiao]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hamata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæmætæth|hæmætæth]] || [[word:hæmætæj|hæmætæj]] || [[word:hæmætæsh|hæmætæsh]] || [[word:hæmætæ|hæmætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamamatath|hamamatath]] || [[word:hamamataj|hamamataj]] || [[word:hamamatash|hamamatash]] || [[word:hamamata|hamamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamatath|hamatath]] || [[word:hamataj|hamataj]] || [[word:hamatash|hamatash]] || [[word:hamata|hamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamaftath|hamaftath]] || [[word:hamaftaj|hamaftaj]] || [[word:hamaftash|hamaftash]] || [[word:hamaftaf|hamaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hamatatha|hamatatha]] || [[word:hamataja|hamataja]] || [[word:hamatasha|hamatasha]] || [[word:hamataka|hamataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hamatath|hamatath]] || [[word:hamataj|hamataj]] || [[word:hamatash|hamatash]] || [[word:hamata|hamata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hamatathal|hamatathal]] || [[word:hamatajal|hamatajal]] || [[word:hamatashal|hamatashal]] || [[word:hamatakal|hamatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hamatathatha|hamatathatha]] || [[word:hamatajaja|hamatajaja]] || [[word:hamatashasha|hamatashasha]] || [[word:hamataka|hamataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hamatathan|hamatathan]] || [[word:hamatajan|hamatajan]] || [[word:hamatashan|hamatashan]] || [[word:hamatakan|hamatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hamatathaoro|hamatathaoro]] || [[word:hamatajaoro|hamatajaoro]] || [[word:hamatashaoro|hamatashaoro]] || [[word:hamatakaoro|hamatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
